evidence_deployment.correction: Prior assessment overstated what TON doesn't know. The 167-page position paper disclosed most core evidence. Held-back reserve is impeachment ammunition (WhatsApp from Billay/Franklin/Nana, 4 call recordings, Phoenix Trading full complaint, actual financial model spreadsheet), not new causes of action.
evidence_deployment.deployment_strategy: Held-back evidence saves for arbitration hearing, not letters. Call recordings play against live testimony. WhatsApp messages impeach TON witnesses under oath. This is when the case breaks.

honest_weaknesses: Budget constraint is the single biggest risk

McCarthy pause unknown to TON — Alberta filing must replace as credibility signal
Damages quantification is the weakest area of the case
